CEO ratifies drafter recommendation (2026-07-10).

DEV-07-PS-CONVERGENCE-AND-CRUCIBLE-DOCKE.rationale: HIGH severity hard-constraint-derived: crucible/nautilus deploy Dockerfile:1-8 header + :35 COPY shared/README.md + hummingbot Dockerfile:28-29+49 PYTHONPATH=/home/hummingbot/shared. Rejecting = breaking crucible production containers. Crucible→custos runtime migration is scope for a dedicated future plan. CEO ratifies drafter recommendation (2026-07-10).

DEV-07-SYNC-CHECK-CADENCE (DP3).ratified_option: (b) weekly diff review (runbook enforcement until Plan 09 CI lands)
DEV-07-SYNC-CHECK-CADENCE (DP3).rationale: Manageable rhythm; (a) needs webhook/polling infra outside Plan 07; (c) risks silent drift accumulation. CEO ratifies drafter recommendation (2026-07-10).

DEV-07-PANDAS-TA-GOVERNANCE (DP4).ratified_option: (a+b) both combined — vendored fork status quo + formalized DEV-06-DP1-DEFERRED-C-OPTION trigger conditions
DEV-07-PANDAS-TA-GOVERNANCE (DP4).rationale: Complementary not alternative. Trigger criteria: (i) >2 upstream drift events/quarter; (ii) other non-Guild projects need reuse; (iii) custos Rust migration starts. CEO ratifies drafter recommendation (2026-07-10).

scope_summary: Plan 07 — 5 Tracks / 9 Tasks (curation status quo per DP1=a) + convergence docs + weekly sync-check runbook + pandas_ta governance formalization. ZERO source-code changes per DEV-07-NO-SOURCE-CODE-CHANGES. Deliverables: 3 NEW contract tests (test_toolkit_sync_check.py + test_toolkit_provenance_schema.py + test_convergence_docs.py) + TOOLKIT_PROVENANCE.md evolution (Curation decision + Drift audit log + pandas_ta governance sections) + Makefile toolkit-sync-check target upgrade (stub → real diff) + docs/design/nautilus_host.md 'Toolkit sync discipline' section + .forge/README.md close-out index + philosophers-stone/shared/README.md single docs-only cross-repo commit (custos-as-authority notice per T3.1).
safety_validator_required: yes — TOOLKIT_PROVENANCE.md is a red-line-adjacent authority document; even docs-only edits get 8-checklist review per teams.yaml discipline. Model=opus (safety-validator role)
lessons_carry_forward: lesson #9/#11/#37 — grep 权威源实证 before any docs claim referencing scout/Plan-06 anchors

lesson #14/#30/#33/#33b — Foundation Scan 4 dimensions (space + namespace + time + layer). Starts from HEAD 4437991 (Plan 04 04b-fix landed after packet drafted; packet §1 says 5eff170 but current is cleaner).
lesson #17 — happy-path 全绿 ≠ 失败模式覆盖. New tests must include failure-mode contract cells.
lesson #21 — zero silent drop. structlog on any drift-detected / sync-diff paths.
lesson #22/#28 — multi-layer independence + relaxed-double test where multi-layer defense exists.
lesson #25 — anti-fabricated close-out. Contract table test names must grep-实存.
lesson #27 — commit scope discipline. git add <specific-file>; git status --short before commit.
lesson #34 — teammate crossed-instructions guard. git log verify before pre-merge instructions.
lesson #39 — worktree boundary: all commits in-branch including close-out; NEVER checkout main.

lesson #40 / custos C40 — red-line gate 3-column (code_coverage / runtime_wire / defer_status). Plan 07 all red lines = no-op (inherited from Plan 03 / 04 / 06 06a) — close-out honors this explicitly.
lesson #C2 — self-review 不豁免. Constraints_honored 每条附 grep evidence + confidence.

Language Policy RED LINE: all NEW test files English; TOOLKIT_PROVENANCE.md additions English; docs sections English. Chinese verbatim quotes from scout/Plan-06 preserved. pre-commit hook 5eff170 (actually 5c01cdb — language hook) blocks new CJK.
9 contract tests must be defined AND grep-实存 at close-out. Include failure-mode cells for drift-detection + sync-mismatch cases (lesson #17).
Cross-repo commit discipline: 2 independent commits — custos side per Track (git add specific files); ps side single docs-only commit for shared/README.md. NEVER git add . / -A (mandatory-rules §6).

Weekly diff review runbook (DP3=b) documented in TOOLKIT_PROVENANCE.md sync section. Trigger criteria for pandas_ta governance (DP4=a+b): (i) >2 upstream drift/quarter; (ii) other non-Guild reuse; (iii) custos Rust migration starts. Verbatim in TOOLKIT_PROVENANCE.md.
